leadText: The Soothe Bell (Japanese: やすらぎのすず Peace Bell) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It amplifies increases to the holder's friendship.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, increases to that Pokémon's friendship are increased by 50%. Generation III [ edit | edit source ] The Soothe Bell increases only the original friendship boost, not bonuses from the Luxury Ball and met location. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] The Soothe Bell increases the friendship boost after applying bonuses from the Luxury Ball and met location.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A hold item that calms spirits and fosters friendship. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . A bell with a comforting chime that makes the holder calm and friendly. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bell with a comforting chime that calms the holder and makes it friendly. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. The comforting chime of this bell calms the holder, making it friendly.
